arts.ttl: ‘A special relationship with Hansi Flick’ – Bayern Munich star back in Barcelona’s sights
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are once again keeping a close eye on developments surrounding the future of Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on…

arts.ttl: Landslide vote for Barcelona’s record-breaking $1.8 billion deal
arts.sum: A landslide vote at an Extraordinary General Assembly of Barcelona’s members has passed a record-breaking kit manufacturing agreement with Nike . Barcelona’s previous Nike deal was valued at $112 million per year, and was due to expire in June 2028.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Atletico Madrid: Catalan giants suffer late injury blow ahead of La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Barcelona will be without the services of Hector Fort for Saturday's La Liga clash against Atletico Madrid due to a hamstring problem.

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief speaks out on Nico Williams pursuit
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has this weekend provided a fresh insight into the club’s summer pursuit of Athletic Club star Nico Williams. The name of wide-man Williams, of course, took…

arts.ttl: Official: Two in, two out as Barcelona name squad to face Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by Barcelona to take on Atlético Madrid later this evening has been unveiled online. And it features a pair of returning…

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man City table 'very attractive offers' to Barcelona star as look to pull off shock January move
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City reportedly submit 'very attractive financial offers' to Barcelona attacker Dani Olmo, who is at the centre of a registration issue.

arts.ttl: Interview: Roberto Jimenez – ‘I’m not sure Hansi Flick’s style will suit Atletico Madrid’
arts.sum: Few clashes between Atletico Madrid and Barcelona in recent times have been so delightfully poised as the clash on Saturday night. Form team Atletico come off the back of eleven straight wins to take on Barcelona, with both teams level on points at the top of the table in La Liga. The Catalan giants have […] The post Interview: Roberto Jimenez – ‘I’m not sure Hansi Flick’s style will suit Atletico Madrid’ appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Lamine Yamal Miss for Barcelona?
arts.sum: Barcelona will be without Lamine Yamal for the remained of 2024 and could miss matches in La Liga, Copa del Rey and Spanish Super Cup.

Hansi Flick appeared before the press this Friday to discuss the massive game that ends the year: Atlético Madrid's visit to the Estadi Olímpic, with defence of the top spot in La Liga at stake. Ansu Fati injury update - FC Barcelona

arts.ttl: Liverpool star 'might prefer Barcelona' amid Spain links
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold has now emerged as Barcelona’s preferred replacement for the ex- Sevilla man and the England star was recently asked to clarify whether or not he would sign a new contract at Liverpool. But Luis Diaz is another Anfield player who could depart after not reaching agreement with the club over a new contract, according to reports.
